title: Dimacria foliolosa

It belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. The classification of Dimacria foliolosa is further divided into the genus Dimacria, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The genus Dimacria is closely related to the genus Oreithyrsa, and both belong to the same family.
